The '''''Kleeque''-class transport''' was a medium-range [[Transport/Legends|transport]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] for military personnel and equipment.

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], many ''Kleeque''-class vessels could be found in the hands of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Originally designed as an inter-[[Star system/Legends|system]] ferry, Rebel ''Kleeque''-class vessels were modified into regimental troopships.

Though they were never intended to enter space combat, they were often used to run blockades and make landings in contested territory. [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] had six ''Kleeque''-class transports on standby for evacuation in addition to their fleet of thirty [[GR-75 medium transport/Legends|GR-75 medium transports]].<ref name="RASBII" />

{{Ship-stub}}
